tags.name: Shri sem Mukhem Nagraja Govansh Seva Samiti - Kullananda Ashram

tags.description: Arya Vihar Ashram was established in 1992 as a place of sadhna under the guidance Spiritual Master Sri Giidhar Aditya. People from all over India and across the world come and stay here for transforming their live in light divine.
tags.name: Arya Vihar Ashram
